description: Tools for searching vehicles, checking availability, and booking transportation in Cambodia (vans, buses, tuk-tuks, private cars). The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these tools to arrange ground transport for users.

tools.name: list_vehicles
tools.description: Search and filter available transportation vehicles in Cambodia. Use this when the user needs transport between cities, a private car for sightseeing, a tuk-tuk for short trips, or a bus for budget travel. Supports filtering by vehicle type, capacity, AC availability, and date range.

has_ac.description: Filter for vehicles with air conditioning

tools.returns: Paginated list of vehicles with id, type, name, capacity, price_per_day_usd, price_per_km_usd, has_ac, has_wifi, rating_average

tools.name: get_vehicle_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific vehicle including specifications, photos, amenities, and pricing. Driver details are not included until 24 hours before the booking start date.
tools.returns: Full vehicle details including description, luggage_capacity, image_urls, rating_count, status

tools.name: check_vehicle_availability
tools.description: Check if a specific vehicle is available for the given date range and get a price estimate. Always call this before creating a booking. Returns availability status and any conflicting bookings.

start_date.description: Start date of the desired booking (YYYY-MM-DD)

end_date.description: End date of the desired booking (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: create_transportation_booking
tools.description: Book a vehicle for the user with a 15-minute hold. Use after confirming availability and user consent. Requires pickup and dropoff locations. The booking enters HOLD status until payment is completed.

pickup_location.description: Pickup address or location name (e.g., 'Phnom Penh Airport')

dropoff_location.description: Drop-off address or location name (e.g., 'Siem Reap City Center')

stops.description: Optional intermediate stops along the route

estimated_distance_km.description: Estimated trip distance in km (needed for per-km priced vehicles)

tools.returns: Booking object with booking_id, vehicle, status (HOLD), total_price_usd, hold expiry

tools.name: get_transportation_booking
tools.description: Retrieve full details of a transportation booking. Driver info (name, phone, plate) is only revealed 24 hours before the booking start date.
tools.returns: Full booking details with vehicle, route, status (HOLD | PENDING_PAYMENT | CONFIRMED | COMPLETED | CANCELLED), driver (revealed 24h before)

tools.name: list_transportation_bookings
tools.description: List all transportation bookings for the current user. Use to show the user their transport reservations or check the status of past bookings.

tools.name: cancel_transportation_booking
tools.description: Cancel a transportation booking. Refund tiers: 100% if cancelled ≥7 days before, 50% if 1–7 days before, 0% if <24 hours before start. Use only when the user explicitly requests cancellation.
